title: 多家AI公司性能差距缩小，整体向上移动
full_text:
Another exponential, the Artificial Analysis one.
It is that almost the entire field is moving upward at the same time.
OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Meta, DeepSeek, Alibaba, Mistral, Kimi and others are now *clustered much closer together* than they were two years ago. h/t https://t.co/6qaNRbQ9QF
